articles.title: Blast triggers fire at restaurant inside Lucknow petrol pump
articles.description: Blast-triggered fire broke out at a restaurant inside a Lucknow petrol pump in Khurram Nagar; likely AC compressor explosion, no casualties, firefighters contained blaze.

articles.title: Himachal: Apple growers fear E20 fuel is taking a toll on farm machinery
articles.description: Apple growers in Himachal Pradesh are raising concerns over the impact of 20 per cent ethanol-blended petrol (E20) on farm equipment, claiming that the fuel is reducing machine efficiency, increasing maintenance costs and affecting the longevity of petrol-operated tools widely used in orchards.

articles.title: Govt. says ethanol blending backed by extensive trials and best practices as concerns linger despite clarifications
articles.description: Government defends ethanol blending in petrol as safe, amid ongoing public concerns and political opposition from Kejriwal.

articles.title: Rachel Reeves confirms new VAT rates for newer petrol and diesel cars before exit as Chancellor
articles.description: HM Treasury, which acts under Chancellor Ms Reeves, has introduced new VAT road fuel scale charges.

articles.title: DOJ and FTC press states to target any illegal activity contributing to high gas prices
articles.description: The federal government issued a letter to states attorneys general urging them to target any unlawful activities contributing to high fuel prices.

articles.title: The road back to $3 gas could be long. Here's what's keeping gasoline prices high, explained
articles.description: US gasoline prices are falling after the Iran peace deal, but $3 gas may not return soon. Here's why fuel prices remain high, explained.

articles.title: E20 fuel backed by scientific studies, government rebuts misinformation

It similarly described viral videos purporting to show sugarcane juice being mixed into petrol as fabricated.

articles.title: Ferrari appeals to traditionalists with new V12 manual gearbox limited edition
articles.description: Ferrari launched a limited-edition 12-cylinder model with a manual gearbox on ‌Friday, appealing to traditional fans of roaring petrol engines and hands-on driving after the mixed initial reception for its first electric vehicle.
